name: Sign In
purpose: Email/password login form. Issues access and refresh tokens on success, applies user theme preference, and handles cross-origin redirects to the reports app.
actions: Log in with email and password

name: Sign Up
purpose: New-user registration form. Collects name, email, phone, and password; validates reCAPTCHA; creates a PENDING account and sends an email-verification link.

name: Verification Pending
purpose: Holding page shown after signup while the user's email is unverified. Lets the user resend the verification email (rate-limited) or update their email address before verifying.

name: Email Verification
purpose: Consumes the CONFIRM_EMAIL JWT from the email link, activates the account (PENDING → ACTIVE), and auto-assigns the user to a matching company if the email domain matches.
actions: Auto-verify on page load via URL token

name: Forgot Password
purpose: Accepts an email address and sends a password-reset link. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.

name: Reset Password
purpose: Consumes the RESET_PASSWORD JWT from the email link and sets a new password. Requires password confirmation.
actions: Set new password via email token
